name: SoftJunk Exact-Intent Answer Pack
purpose: Buyer-agent packet for exact lead follow-up questions with copy-ready answers, product routes, text routes, payment handoff, and verification gate.

answers.question: What should I text a lead after a missed call?
answers.short_answer: Name the missed call, offer help, and ask for one easy next step.
answers.sample: Hi [Name], sorry I missed your call about [service]. I can help. Do you want the fastest available time, or should I answer one quick question first?
answers.payment_note: Custom Sequence | Business: [business type] | Service: [service] | Source: missed call | Tone: [tone] | Need: missed-call follow-up

answers.question: How do I follow up after sending an estimate?
answers.short_answer: Reference the estimate, remove friction, and ask whether price, timing, or scope is blocking the decision.
answers.sample: Hi [Name], checking that you saw the estimate for [project]. If the scope looks right, I can send the next step. If price or timing is the blocker, reply with that and I will adjust the path.
answers.payment_note: Custom Sequence | Business: [business type] | Service: [estimate/project] | Source: estimate sent | Tone: [tone] | Need: estimate follow-up

answers.question: How do I reply when a lead says the price is too high?
answers.short_answer: Acknowledge the concern and offer a smaller or clearer next step instead of arguing.
answers.sample: Totally fair to compare options. If budget is the main issue, I can show the smallest useful version first or explain what is included so you can decide.
answers.payment_note: Custom Sequence | Business: [business type] | Service: [service] | Source: price objection | Tone: [tone] | Need: price-objection follow-up

answers.question: What should I send after a no-show?
answers.short_answer: Keep the tone neutral and make rescheduling easy.
answers.sample: Hi [Name], looks like today got busy. Do you want me to send another time for [service], or should I close this for now?
answers.payment_note: Custom Sequence | Business: [business type] | Service: [appointment/service] | Source: no-show appointment | Tone: [tone] | Need: no-show follow-up

answers.question: How do I follow up with a quiet DM lead?
answers.short_answer: Use a low-pressure reply with a one-word response option.
answers.sample: Hi [Name], quick follow-up on [service]. If you are still interested, reply with "times" and I will send the easiest next step. If not, no problem.
answers.payment_note: Custom Sequence | Business: [business type] | Service: [service] | Source: quiet DM | Tone: [tone] | Need: quiet DM follow-up

fulfillment_rule: Do not claim the order is paid, started, or delivered unless the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
